- High volatility (88.3%) and recent negative momentum (-18.74% over 14 days) suggest continued downside pressure
- However, both UNI and AAVE are blue-chip DeFi protocols with support levels that may prevent catastrophic declines
- The next 14 days fall entirely within the reversion period after the 30-day rally, suggesting mean reversion to lower levels
